# Daily Report — 2026-05-07

## Task Completed
Added attachment management tools (`list_attachments`, `get_attachment`, `delete_attachment`) via the ServiceNow `/api/now/attachment` REST API. `list_attachments` queries by `table_name` + `table_sys_id` with optional `file_name` / `content_type` filters and full pagination. `get_attachment` fetches metadata for a single attachment by sys_id. `delete_attachment` permanently removes an attachment with a 404 guard. All three tools are registered in `system_administrator` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 931 passed (21 new)
- Coverage: 91% overall; attachment_tools.py 94%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level package vulnerabilities (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) — not in project code. No issues in new code.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py`

## Next Up
Add `list_catalogs` tool (referenced as TODO in tool_packages.yaml) to list available service catalogs from `sc_catalog` table.
